tweets.text:
Windows has been degrading your game audio since the day you installed it.

Win+R → mmsys.cpl → Playback tab → Right click your device → Properties:

Format → 16 bit, 48000 Hz Disable all enhancements Spatial sound → OFF Exclusive mode → Both checkboxes ON

Every headset, https://t.co/JxQJjy5NW7
